trial_details.trajectory:
The pod is in an ErrImageNeverPull status, meaning the container image cannot be pulled.The key issues are:
1. The container image "misspeling-app:latset" cannot be pulled, causing the ErrImageNeverPull error.
2. The image name is misspelled as "misspeling-app" instead of "misspelling-app".The fix is to update the container image in the deployment spec from "misspeling-app:latset" to "misspelling-app:latest".

FIX COMPLETE
